title: Who Touched Me
summary: “And when the woman saw that she was not hid, she came trembling, and falling down before him, she declared unto him before all the people for what cause she had touched him, and how she was healed immediately.” Luke 8:47 A woman who was menstruating or bled for any other reason was considered unclean, according to the Law of Moses. Leviticus 15 gives a detailed list of all that becomes unclean for the duration of the blood issue –beds,chairs, vessels, clothes etc. “And if a woman have an issue, and her issue in her flesh be blood, she shall be put apart seven days: and whosoever toucheth her shall be unclean until the even.And everything that she lieth upon in her separation shall be unclean: everything also that she sitteth upon shall be unclean”(Leviticus 15:19,20). Perhaps this woman was terrified of the consequences of the Law of Moses, as I said previously. But she forgot that the Law of Moses had no power against the grace and love of the Lord Jesus Christ. Let me share a spiritual insight about the relationship between the issue of blood from women and the blood of the Lord Jesus Christ.
